title: Lesson 71
paragraph: This lesson practices useful verbs for animals and outdoor actions.

words.meaning: to make the sound a dog makes
words.example: The dog barks at the gate.

words.meaning: to jump with short quick moves
words.example: The rabbit hops across the grass.

words.meaning: to move on hands and knees or close to the ground
words.example: The baby crawls on the floor.

words.meaning: to make a hole in the ground
words.example: The dog digs in the yard.

words.meaning: to give food to a person or animal
words.japaneseMeaning: 餌をやる／食べ物を与える
words.example: I feed the fish every morning.

words.meaning: to run after someone or something
to go where others cannot see you
words.example: The cat hides under the sofa.
Do not let the dog bite your hand.

words.meaning: to hurt with a sharp part of the body
words.example: A bee can sting your arm.
